full_text: Basically, if you are passing out on the first day, if you are unable to stand up, if you are unable to go to school, if you are vomiting, if you are unable to walk, put one leg in front of the other, then that's not normal, okay? It's not normal. You do not have to get used to it. You do not have to grow up. You do not have to realize that you're becoming a woman. It's not your fault. You are not to blame for any of this, okay? This is endo, okay? And most people get their symptoms at 11.
